introSection:
Spinning Coaster (sometimes called Spinning Coaster XXL) is a travelling roller coaster currently owned by Dutch showman Colin Buwalda. It is a steel spinning wild mouse built by French manufacturer Reverchon.

In late 2014, an extension to the ride was manufactured which adds an additional two drops to the beginning of the ride. When the ride is setup with the extension, it is called Spinning Coaster XXL.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Purple track and yellow supports, used to be yellow track with blue supports.

fullText:
Spinning Coaster (sometimes called Spinning Coaster XXL) is a travelling roller coaster currently owned by Dutch showman Colin Buwalda. It is a steel spinning wild mouse built by French manufacturer Reverchon.

In late 2014, an extension to the ride was manufactured which adds an additional two drops to the beginning of the ride. When the ride is setup with the extension, it is called Spinning Coaster XXL.



Purple track and yellow supports, used to be yellow track with blue supports.
